pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 1.8 to 11 to align with the target JDK.
Add explicit dependency for javax.annotation-api to replace modules removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.5.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to support Java 11 and modernize the framework.
Upgrade the Cassandra driver to version 4.6.1 to ensure compatibility with the new Spring Boot and Java 11 environment.
Replace jackson-datatype-joda with jackson-datatype-jsr310 to use Java 8+ Time API instead of Joda-Time.
Replace springfox-swagger-ui with springfox-oas to support OpenAPI 3.0 specifications.
Replace mapstruct-jdk8 with mapstruct to use the standard artifact name compatible with newer Java versions.
Replace net.jpountz.lz4 with org.lz4:lz4-java to use the maintained LZ4 library compatible with Java 11.
Replace commons-lang with commons-lang3 to use the modern Apache Commons Lang library.
Import jhipster-dependencies BOM to manage transitive dependency versions consistently.
Add jhipster-framework dependency to utilize shared JHipster utilities and configurations.
Add testcontainers database-commons to modernize integration testing infrastructure.
Add archunit-junit5 for architectural unit testing capabilities.
Update various Maven plugins (compiler, surefire, failsafe, etc.) to versions compatible with Java 11 and modern build standards.
Change project packaging from war to jar to align with modern Spring Boot executable jar conventions.
Update groupId and artifactId to reflect the new sample application identity.
Remove deprecated Spring Data Cassandra dependency in favor of the official DataStax driver.
Remove legacy Apache Cassandra client dependency.
Remove old DataStax Java Driver core dependency.
Remove old DataStax Java Driver mapping dependency.
Remove deprecated Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies.
Remove deprecated Spark metrics reporter dependency.
Add new DataStax Java Driver mapper runtime dependency.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for JWT handling.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JWT handling.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for metrics.
Add Dropwizard metrics core dependency.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 API for architecture tests.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 engine for architecture tests.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web for standard error responses.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine from Spring Boot Starter Test to enforce JUnit 5.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added exclusion for junit-vintage-engine in spring-boot-starter-test

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jib Maven plugin for container image building.
Add Checkstyle Maven plugin for code style enforcement.
Add Javadoc Maven plugin for documentation generation.
Add Failsafe Maven plugin for integration testing.
Add Properties Maven plugin for reading project properties.
Add Git Commit ID plugin for build metadata.
Update Maven Compiler Plugin to use annotation processor paths for MapStruct and Spring Boot.
Update Maven Enforcer Plugin to require Java 8-15 and specific Maven version.
Update Maven Resources Plugin to filter YAML configuration files.
pom.xml.human_impl: Configured filtering for config/*.yml in maven-resources-plugin

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Surefire Plugin to exclude integration tests.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added excludes for **/*IT* and **/*IntTest* in maven-surefire-plugin

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven War Plugin to handle static resources correctly.
pom.xml.human_impl: Configured warSourceDirectory and webResources in maven-war-plugin

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot Maven Plugin to repackage and fork execution.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added repackage goal and fork=true in spring-boot-maven-plugin

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JaCoCo Maven Plugin to separate unit and integration test coverage.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added pre/post unit and integration test executions in jacoco-maven-plugin

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove executable permission from pom.xml.
Switch the embedded web server from Tomcat to Undertow to align with JHipster's default configuration for Java 11.
Replace the deprecated Yeoman/Grunt build process with Webpack via the frontend-maven-plugin to support modern frontend tooling.
Add Spring Boot DevTools to the development profile to enable automatic restarts and live reload during development.
Configure the Spring Boot Maven plugin to generate build-info.properties for Actuator exposure.
Add the git-commit-id-plugin to generate git information properties for the application.
Add a dedicated Maven profile for building WAR files using the maven-war-plugin.
Add an IDE profile to include annotation processors like MapStruct for better IDE support.
Add an Eclipse-specific profile to handle m2e lifecycle mapping and ignore frontend plugin executions in the IDE.
Add an end-to-end testing profile with specific final name and plugin management.
Refactor Maven profiles to use property-based activation and composition (e.g., api-docs, tls) instead of hardcoded arguments.
Update the maven-clean-plugin configuration to clean the new static resource directory structure.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganize .editorconfig to group file-specific overrides and update glob patterns for modern web development file types.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent settings to specific globs like [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] and removed legacy {package,bower}.json block.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced simple wildcard rules with detailed lists for text, binary, documents, graphics, configs, and media files.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore the generated main CSS file to prevent committing build artifacts.
Ignore static resources copied to the target classes directory during build.
Ignore JavaScript test coverage reports generated by the test runner.
Ignore Node.js temporary directories and debug logs.
Ignore Webpack and Angular cache directories to keep the repository clean.
Ignore Spring Tool Suite 4 specific cache directories.
Ignore IntelliJ IDEA output directories for compiled classes.
Ignore Visual Studio Code configuration and workspace files.
Ignore the Gradle build output directory.
Ensure the Maven Wrapper JAR is not ignored, allowing it to be committed.
Ignore the ESLint cache file to improve linting performance.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with the Java 11 migration.
Switch authentication mechanism from session-based to JWT.
Rename the application package to io.github.jhipster.sample.
Rename the application base name to jhipsterCassandraSampleApplication.
Remove the deprecated Grunt frontend builder configuration.
Remove explicit Java 8 version configuration as it is no longer needed for Java 11.
Convert string boolean values to actual JSON booleans for consistency.
Configure Gatling and Protractor as test frameworks.
Specify AngularX as the client framework.
Add a JWT secret key configuration for the new authentication type.
Explicitly define the application type as monolith.
Explicitly set cache provider to none.
Specify npm as the client package manager.
Set English as the native language.
Add explicit skip flags for client, server, and user management.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the generic placeholder README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'README for jhipster' with full JHipster documentation including development, testing, and Docker sections.

package.json.general_idea: Update the required Node.js version to 14.15.0 to align with modern tooling and JDK 11 era build environments.
Replace the legacy Grunt-based build system and AngularJS dependencies with Angular 11 and the Angular CLI ecosystem.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, karma, requirejs; Added @angular/core, @angular/cli, webpack

package.json.general_idea: Upgrade the JHipster generator dependency from version 2.19.0 to 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Replace Karma/Jasmine testing infrastructure with Jest and Protractor for end-to-end testing.
package.json.human_impl: Removed karma, jasmine-core; Added jest, protractor, @angular-builders/jest

package.json.general_idea: Introduce ESLint and Prettier for code quality and formatting, replacing older JSHint setups.
Rewrite npm scripts to use Angular CLI commands (ng build, ng serve) and Maven wrappers instead of Grunt tasks.
Add npm scripts to manage Docker containers for Cassandra and other services during CI/CD.
Update package name, version, and description to reflect the specific sample application identity.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's default block-based banner using ${AnsiColor.GREEN} and ${AnsiColor.RED} variables.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Data Cassandra configuration keys to match Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions and add required local-datacenter property.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: contactPoints -> contact-points, keyspaceName -> keyspace-name, added local-datacenter: datacenter1

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring messages cache property to use ISO 8601 duration format required by Spring Boot 2.x.
Remove deprecated Thymeleaf XHTML mode configuration as it is no longer supported in newer Spring Boot versions.
Add JHipster-specific configuration properties for security, CORS, and logging which were previously handled differently or missing.
Configure Spring Boot DevTools for development profile, enabling restart and excluding static resources.
Define explicit logging levels for root, JHipster, Hibernate, and application packages in the dev profile.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl: Added logging.level.ROOT: DEBUG, logging.level.tech.jhipster: DEBUG, etc.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add Spring Mail configuration properties for the development environment.
Enable pretty-printing for JSON output in the development profile.
Remove legacy metrics configuration (Spark/Graphite) which is no longer part of the default JHipster setup or Spring Boot 2.x defaults.
Include additional profiles like api-docs in the active profile list.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Introduce JHipster-specific configuration properties for security, mail, and logging.
Update Cassandra data source configuration to use new property names and add local datacenter.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl:
spring:
  data:
    cassandra:
      contact-points: localhost
      local-datacenter: datacenter1

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Configure management metrics export to Prometheus.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Define logging levels for root and application packages.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: INFO
    tech.jhipster: INFO

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Enable HTTP response compression for specific MIME types.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl:
server:
  compression:
    enabled: true
    mime-types: text/html,...

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Configure the server to support graceful shutdown.
Explicitly disable Spring Boot DevTools for the production profile.
Add standard Spring Boot mail properties for SMTP configuration.
Increase the HTTP cache time-to-live from 31 days to 1461 days.
Remove legacy metrics configuration for Spark and Graphite.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x management properties with Spring Boot 2.x structure.
Update custom async thread pool configuration to standard Spring Boot 2.x task execution properties.
Move mail configuration from custom root keys to standard Spring Boot mail properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: mail.host -> spring.mail.host (implied by removal of custom mail block)

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Update Swagger documentation properties to match newer JHipster/SpringFox configuration structure.
Add explicit security configuration for remember-me keys which were previously implicit or handled differently.
Configure specific management endpoints and health probes required for modern Spring Boot actuator.
Add Micrometer metrics configuration for Prometheus export and distribution statistics.
Add server servlet session cookie security settings.
Add JHipster-specific application properties for client app name and API docs.

src/main/resources/config/cql/create-key.general_idea: Rename the Cassandra keyspace from the generic 'jhipster' to a specific application name to avoid conflicts in production environments.
src/main/resources/config/cql/create-key.human_impl: CREATE KEYSPACE IF NOT EXISTS jhipsterCassandraSampleApplication

src/main/resources/config/cql/create-key.general_idea: Add a schema_version table to the keyspace to support database migration tracking (likely for Liquibase or Flyway).
